meta.title: EarthScore — The operating system for the circular economy
hero.h1: The operating system for the circular economy.
hero.sub: EarthScore connects your data, identifies the biggest economic levers and makes them tradable — from the first audit to the transaction in the Circular Marketplace. Agentic AI orchestrates. You decide.
mock.title: Hotspot ranking
peek.name: Aluminium chips → foundry
wert.eyebrow: What EarthScore does for your company
wert.h2: Data becomes decisions. Decisions become returns.
wert.lead: EarthScore is the operational layer between your existing assets and the circular economy — not reporting, but execution.
wert.b1h: More than efficiency — a new revenue stream
wert.b1p: Every operation holds untapped value: energy, materials, by-products, synergies. EarthScore makes them visible, prioritises them by economics and connects you with the network that makes them actionable.
wert.b2p: Every measure pays for itself. This isn't software you rent and cancel — these are capabilities that stay in your company: documented, transferable, with measurable value.
wert.callout-body: Credits instead of license fees. Every plan includes a monthly credit allowance that powers all AI features. Start for free; unused credits don't expire.
wert.videotag: Three minutes — how EarthScore works in your company.
plat.h2: A system that understands your operation end to end.
plat.sub: Five building blocks, one goal: measurable returns. Diagnosis, prioritisation, execution, proof, scaling — every stage feeds your result. Not a toolkit, one architecture.
band.eyebrow: Agentic AI · Human in the loop
band.p: Specialised AI agents do the heavy lifting — analysis, pattern recognition, matching, documentation. At every decision-critical point, a human stays in control. That's not only safer — under the EU AI Act it's the only viable path for critical business processes.
band.note: Four steps, one loop — the human sets the pace.
band.cluster-label: Behind every feature: an agentic workforce
feat.h2: Four AI capabilities, one measurable result.
feat.sub: What EarthScore actually does — from transformation simulation to the scored match. The AI-driven functions use credits; the entire operational foundation is included in the subscription.
feat.bp: Transformation simulation with before/after comparison: based on a Value Audit of several hundred data points, a prioritised action plan emerges — in five levels of depth.
feat.rs: Material search with buy and sell modes: the Research Agent continuously scans external sources for suitable trading partners and lists them by match logic. With no hit, your request stays active — you're notified as soon as the material becomes available.
feat.sm: An AI agent processes search and match requests: it scans your structured inputs and finds the most relevant matches across available data sources and marketplace participants — scored across multiple dimensions.
feat.ca: Automated communication across the entire trade — enquiries, negotiations, status updates, incl. Contact Agent. Drafted by the AI, confirmed by you.
feat.ca.msg1: Is the material single-grade? Weekly offtake possible?
feat.ca.msg2: Yes — single-grade, approx. 4 t/week. Proposal: 12-month framework agreement.
feat.outcome.h: Actions become measurable savings — in euros and CO₂.
feat.outcome.p: Not an AI feature, but the result: every implemented measure shows up as cost savings and avoided CO₂ — the benefit that carries the platform.
feat.base.label: Included in the subscription — no credits
makro.eyebrow: Why now — and why from Germany
makro.p1: Applied AI decides the competitiveness of entire economies. The European opportunity lies in industrial application — where our Mittelstand and our data reality are strong.
makro.p2: EarthScore was built to seize that opportunity: European data, European infrastructure, European value creation. What's created here stays here.
makro.p1t: Value creation stays in the system
makro.p1d: Data processing, AI inference, matching and marketplace transactions — all within European infrastructure. The value doesn't flow away.
makro.p2d: Every hour of AI use in industry means utilisation for data centres, connectivity and data partners in Germany. Scaled application creates scaled demand.
makro.p3d: Companies can't be held hostage when their operational intelligence is processed at home. Sovereignty comes from having capable platforms of one's own.
price.h2: Start for free. Scale when it pays off.
price.sub: Every plan includes a monthly allowance of credits — the unit of compute for all AI features.
price.incl.label: Included in every plan
price.incl.sub: All AI features — no tier gate
price.footnote: All actions share the same monthly credit allowance. Unused credits don't expire — included and purchased credits both carry over. The 14-day free trial — no credit card — is available for new sign-ups until 30 September; after that, entry is directly via a paid plan. Plan upgrade & payment any time in the tool. Every paid plan allows additional seats; extra credits can be purchased separately as needed. Prices excl. VAT.
credits.sub: Approximate credits per use. Every AI action draws credits from your plan's monthly allowance.
credits.bp.title: Circular Blueprints
credits.fn.title: Agentic AI functions
credits.note: All figures in credits, approx. per use. Unused credits don't expire — and you can top up anytime.
approx.label: Approx. actions / month
faq.head: Frequently asked questions
faq.q1: Do we need to change our IT infrastructure to start?
faq.a1: No. EarthScore builds on existing data — you start lean via the Value Audit. Existing systems like ERP, energy management or procurement can be connected, but aren't a must. No greenfield project; you're up and running in a few days.
faq.a2: GDPR-compliant on European infrastructure, end-to-end encryption. For sensitive operations we use no third parties outside the EU — the complete audit trail stays with you.
faq.q3: How does EarthScore differ from ESG reporting tools?
faq.a3: EarthScore isn't a reporting system. Reporting tools document the status quo — EarthScore simulates before/after with Circular Blueprints, uses AI to find buyers and materials, and handles the trade. CSRD and ESRS serve as a proof standard, not a product category; the goal is operational impact in euros and CO₂.
faq.q4: How quickly do we see results?
faq.a4: In stages: setup in a few days, first prioritised levers after 2 to 4 weeks (following the Value Audit), measurable euro and CO₂ impact in the second quarter after launch.
faq.q5: Is EarthScore suitable for mid-sized companies?
faq.a5: Yes — the industrial Mittelstand is our core audience. Built for companies with a strong operational reality but no in-house AI department.
faq.q6: What are credits — and what happens when they run out?
faq.a6: Credits are the unit of compute for the AI features. Every plan includes a monthly allowance; unused credits don't expire. If the allowance isn't enough, you can purchase additional credits separately at any time.
kontakt.p: In 20 minutes we'll show you — for your industry — which levers EarthScore finds and how the first euro impact arises. No obligation, no sales pressure.
kontakt.t2: An expert conversation, not a sales pitch
kontakt.formsub: A few details — we'll tailor it to your industry.
kontakt.note: We'll get back to you within one business day.
kontakt.formfoot: Free & non-binding. Your details are used solely to get in touch — GDPR-compliant, no newsletter.
kontakt.ok.p: We'll be in touch within one business day with a proposed time for your walkthrough.
footer.tagline: The operating system for the circular economy. Made in Germany. Built for Europe's industrial reality.
cc.body: We use necessary cookies to operate this website. With your consent we also use statistics, marketing and external-media services to understand how our website is used. You're free to choose and can change your selection at any time. Details in the privacy policy.
cc.title: Cookie settings
cc.necessary.d: Required to operate the website and store your cookie choice. These cookies can't be disabled.
cc.statistik.d: Google Analytics — measures anonymously which channels visitors come from, how they move and where they drop off.
cc.marketing.d: LinkedIn Insight Tag — measures the success of our campaigns and social-media channels.
cc.medien.d: Google Maps — loads map content. Without consent a placeholder is shown.
